summary: Highly regarded audience recording that stands out among the available AUDs of this show.
review: The reviewer rates this tape as their favorite audience (AUD) source for the concert, indicating a relatively clear and engaging listening experience compared with other fan recordings. No specific comments are made about the musical performance or setlist, but the 5‑star rating reflects strong overall satisfaction.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review; positive sentiment suggests both a good show and a solid audience recording, but limited detail reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it their favorite AUD of the show, implying clearer sound and better mix than other audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance quality were provided.
